hero.subtitle: State-of-the-art equipment and premium products. Remarkable results, guaranteed at every visit.

items.title: Exterior Wash
items.desc: Complete body cleaning with active foam, high-pressure jet and professional drying.

items.title: Interior Cleaning
items.desc: Full vacuuming, dashboard and surface wipe-down, window cleaning and plastic treatment.

items.title: Polish & Wax
items.desc: Paint protection, gloss enhancement and UV protection for a shining car.

items.title: Full Detailing
items.desc: Complete professional interior and exterior detailing. Impeccable results guaranteed.

items.title: Upholstery Cleaning
items.desc: Deep cleaning of seats, carpets and upholstery. Stain and odour elimination.

items.title: Ceramic Treatment
items.desc: Long-lasting nano-ceramic protection. Hydrophobic coating for an immaculate finish.

why.desc: With over 10 years of industry experience, we have served tens of thousands of satisfied customers throughout the capital. We use exclusively certified products and state-of-the-art equipment.

features.title: Professional Equipment
features.desc: State-of-the-art machinery for remarkable results at every wash.

features.title: Premium Products
features.desc: We use exclusively certified products, safe for your paint and the environment.

features.title: Qualified Staff
features.desc: Expert team with specialised training in professional auto-detailing.

features.title: Speed
features.desc: Fast and efficient service, with no compromise on quality.
